title: The Villain makes opponent pay 10 primary damage to play magic

card.rawText: While this card is on the field, your opponent(s) must deal 10 damage to their primary creature to play a magic card. This creature receives 3x Atk damage from "The Hero" and "The Heroine" creatures.

effect.value: While this card is on the field, your opponent(s) must deal 10 damage to their primary creature to play a magic card. This creature receives 3x Atk damage from "The Hero" and "The Heroine" creatures.
